title: iberis carnosa subsp. granatensis
intro: Iberis carnosa subsp. granatensis, also known as Spanish candytuft, is a flowering plant species within the cress family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. Iberis carnosa subsp. granatensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
